meaning: n.插图画家,图解者,说明者
examples: There is one other early Romantic, who was an illustrator as well.
In ''On Thin Ice'', Richard Ellis, a writer and illustrator, paints a natural history of the icon of the north, the polar bear.
Other prominent UK Artists for Peace include Lauren Child, the children's book author and illustrator.
Elliott's other pick is by illustrator W.W. Denslow, a work remarkable for bright, poster-like colors.
